description: Triggered when the user wants to optimize conversion rates on marketing pages, implement CRO UI patterns, or diagnose why a page isn't converting well.
should_trigger: This landing page isn't converting — what should I fix?
Implement a pricing page with anchoring and plan recommendations
Add exit intent popup to capture leaving visitors
Create a multi-step form to reduce perceived complexity
Add real-time social proof notifications to the landing page
Implement a sticky CTA for mobile users
Optimize our hero section layout for maximum conversions
should_not_trigger: Write the copy for our homepage from scratch
Set up GA4 event tracking on our forms
How do I design a signup flow for our SaaS onboarding?
Build a popup for our exit intent with email collection
